channel.title: Wp Menu Cannot read property 'map' of undefined
channel.description:
Hello @mburridge. I have been following the wp menu video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BMJn0RZ2I9s but all I seem to be getting is https://gyazo.com/c372128b2e2e957a8119864d488cc3ca https://gyazo.com/7c4a08bcedf9f559402ab26e0dd4595c
github link https://github.com/TristonH55/my-frontity-wp.
Thanks for your help.

item.title: Wp Menu Cannot read property 'map' of undefined
item.dc:creator: 1600tc
item.description:
Hi, if map returns undefined, it’s because one of your variables is undefined from the beggining, have you checked the value of each one ? Might be because you render your map before variables has value, try to use useEffect maybe ?

Read full topic
item.source: Wp Menu Cannot read property 'map' of undefined

item.title: Wp Menu Cannot read property 'map' of undefined
item.dc:creator: oop
item.description:
Hello @mburridge. I have been following the wp menu video Frontity Talks 2021-01 - Fetching menus from WordPress - YouTube
but all I seem to be getting is Screenshot - c372128b2e2e957a8119864d488cc3ca - Gyazo Screenshot - 7c4a08bcedf9f559402ab26e0dd4595c - Gyazo

github link GitHub - TristonH55/my-frontity-wp: menu rigging for frontity and wordpress.

Thanks for your help.

Read full topic
item.source: Wp Menu Cannot read property 'map' of undefined
